The Awakening

REVUELTO

Website se laptop wala video completely remove kar diya gaya hai. Build ko aur smooth, lighter aur lag-free banaya gaya hai — ab focus sirf premium sections, stronger typography, smoother motion aur better section-wise sound pe hai.

1015 CV / 747 kW
0–100 km/h in 2.5 s
Top speed > 350 km/h
Phase 01 / Exterior & Aero

A spaceship on wheels

Official Lamborghini brochure Revuelto ko “A Spaceship on Wheels” bolti hai, with sculpted lines, smooth negative radiuses, a unique center line, and Y-shaped LED lighting. Is section mai wheels, aero flow, front lights aur body language ko cleaner and sharper way mai present kiya gaya hai.

360°Aerodynamics
3Rear wing positions
Full LEDY-shaped lights
CFRPMonofuselage focus
Phase 02 / Heart of the beast

Thunder meets lightning

Official model page ke mutabik Revuelto ek new V12 engine, 3 electric motors aur 8-speed dual-clutch gearbox ko combine karta hai. Is section ka audio exhaust-focused hai taaki energy aur aggression better feel ho.

011015 CV combined system output from ICE + electric architecture.
02V12 + 3 electric motors define Lamborghini’s first HPEV super sports platform.
030–100 km/h in 2.5 s and top speed above 350 km/h.
04Transversal 8-speed DCT keeps the hybrid system brutally responsive.
Phase 03 / Pilot’s cockpit

Feel like a pilot

Brochure cabin ko fighter-jet inspired cockpit batati hai, with Y-shaped dashboard, integrated rotors and switches, and a passenger display. Is section mai cabin ko cleaner, more premium and more readable styling ke saath treat kiya gaya hai.

01Driver display as a focused digital command layer.
02Passenger display highlighted as co-pilot performance theatre.
03Seats & belts framed like a tight aircraft-inspired command position.
04Carbon fiber surfaces enhanced using moving light sweep and deeper contrast.
Feel like a pilotDriver-centered geometry and fighter-jet inspired forms.
Passenger displayA shared performance screen that extends the experience.
Visible composite energyCarbon fiber, stitching, seats, steering wheel, and layered interface details.
V12 Hybrid high performance
Added premium closing block

Forged for the future

Tumne bola tha footer ke end wale tech labels remove karne hain — so unki jagah ek better premium signature block add kiya gaya hai. Ye section website ko zyada luxury feel deta hai aur CTA tak ek stronger visual build-up create karta hai.

01Cleaner ending without those GSAP / Lenis / Three.js text labels.
02More premium feel with a refined emblem-like motion section before CTA.
03Better performance because the removed laptop/video section cut rendering load.
Final phase

Configure the future

No laptop video. No extra tech-label clutter. Just a cleaner, smoother, more premium Revuelto ending screen with stronger CTA focus.
